# OCRLLM Repo-Owned Quality Fixtures

The synthetic Phase 1 fixture text, layout, generator code, and rendered image
artifacts were created specifically for this repository during implementation.
They contain no copied course material or user-supplied document content.

License identifier: `LicenseRef-OCRLLM-Repo-Owned-Test-Data`.

Permission: these fixture artifacts may be stored, copied, and redistributed as
part of this repository and its test/evidence archives. This permission does not
apply to the separately identified Noto font or CC0 whiteboard photograph; their
own provenance and license records control those files.
